calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-05-2009 Off Calendar

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jan-26-2009 Assigned To Trial Court

SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Jan-26-2009 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Mar-17-09 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 212
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Court Trial/Settlement Conference. Commissioner William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Lois Jones, CSR #3689.

Robert D. Resner, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Creditors Trade Association, Inc., dba Great Western Collection Bureau.
George Looney, President of Creditors Trade Association, Inc., dba Great Western Collection Bureau, was placed under oath and examined.
Benjamin J. Maryanski, Esq. appeared with defendants George Howard Atkins, a/k/a Howard George Atkins, individually & dba Sleep Outlet Shop, and Romie Atkins, individually & dba Sleep Outlet Shop.
Defendants were placed under oath examined.
Notice of Time and Place of Trial was filed on June 4, 2008.

Terms of the Settlement Agreement were read into the record by Mr. Resner. In accordance with the agreement of the parties, defendants George Howard Atkins, a/k/a Howard George Atkins, individually & dba Sleep Outlet Shop, and Romie Atkins, individually & dba Sleep Outlet Shop shall pay plaintiff Creditors Trade Association, Inc., dba Great Western Collection Bureau, the sum of $3,500.00 within thirty days. If defendants comply with the terms of the settlement agreement, plaintiff shall dismiss the complaint with prejudice.

Parties were voir dired as to their understanding of the terms of the agreement.

This matter is continued to March 17, 2009 @ 10:00 a.m. in Department 212 on the CRC 3.1385 Dismissal Calendar.

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Sep-19-2008 Continued To Jan-26-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-04-2008 Set For Trial On Sep-15-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-20-2008 Continued To Jun-20-08 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 212
